verses.text: Tua ciangin Joshua in Israel minam khempeuh Shekhem-ah kaikhawmin a upate, a makaite, a thukhente, leh Israel uliante a sam hi. Tua ciangin Pasian' mai-ah amau ciat kipia uh hi

Tua ciangin Joshua in mi khempeuh tungah, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin thu gen a, ‘Tanglai-in Eufratis gun galkhatah na pu na pate uh teng ngei a, tuate lakah Abraham leh Nahor' pa Terah pen khat bek ahi hi. Na pu na pate un pasian dangte bia uh hi
Tua ciangin Gun gal panin na pu uh Abraham la-in Kanaan gam khempeuhah ka paipih a, a suanlekhakte tampi ka phasak hi. Ama tungah Isaac ka pia a
Isaac tungah Jakob leh Esau ka pia hi. A neih dingin Seir mualtung gam Esau ka pia a, ahih hangin Jakob leh a tate Egypt-ah a paisuk uh hi
Tua ciangin Moses leh Aaron ka sawl a, a gamsunga ka sepnate tawh Egypt ka gimsak khit ciangin note kong paikhiatpih hi
Egypt panin na pu na pate uh ka paikhiatpih a, tuipi a tung uh hi. Egypt mite in leeng leh sakol tung tuangte tawh na pu na pate uh San Tuipi-ah delh uh hi

Kei tungah amaute hong kiko uh ciangin amaute leh Egypt mite kikalah khuamial ka koih a, Egypt mite tungah tuipi luangsakin amaute ka tuumsak hi. Egypt tungah ka bawlna na thei uh a, sehnel gam sungah sauveipi na om uh hi

Tua ciangin Jordan galkhatah a teng Amor mite' leitangah note kong paipih hi. Amaute in note hong do-in, note' khutsungah amaute kong pia a, note in amau' leitang na luah uh a, note' mai-ah amaute ka susia hi
Tua ciangin Moab kumpipa, Zippor' tapa Balak hong khangin Israel mite hong do hi. Amah in mi sawlin note hong samsia dingin Beor' tapa Balaam a samsak hi
Ahih hangin Balaam' thu ka ngai kei hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in note thupha hong pia hi. Tua ahih manin Balak' khutsung panin note kong honkhia hi

Tua ahih ciangin Jordan galkhatah pai-in Jerikho na tung uh a, Jerikho mite in note hong do uh hi. Amor mite, Perez mite, Kanaan mite, Hit mite, Girgash mite, Hiv mite, leh Jebus mite in zong note hong do uh a, ahi zongin note' khutsungah amaute kong pia hi
Amor kumpi nihte note mai-ah a hawlkhia tunpite keimah in note mai-ah ka sawl hi. Tua pen note' namsau ahi a, note' thal tawh ahi zongin na dona hang uh hilo hi
Note in na seploh uh leitang, na satloh uh khuapite, note tungah kong pia a, tuate sungah na teng uh hi. Na suan'loh uh leenggui lo pan a gah leh oliv huan pan a gah na ne uh hi,’ ci hi
“Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Topa zahtak un la, lungsim tak leh thumanna tawh ama na sem un. Na pu na pate un Gun gal leh Egypt gamsungah a biak uh pasian-te koihkhia un la, Topa' na sem un

Topa' na na sepnop kei uh leh, Gun galkhata a na na sepsak uh na pu na pate uh pasian ahi a, note' ten'na gam Amor mite' pasian ahi zongin, a na na sepsak ding peuhpeuh uh tuni-in teel un. Ahih hangin kei leh ka innkuanpihte in ahih leh Topa' na ka sem ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin mite in dawngin, “Adang pasian-te' na a sem dingin Topa nusiat ding ka ngaihsun ngei kei ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh salsuahna Egypt gam panin eite leh i pu i pate a hong paikhiatpih, eite' muhna-ah tua lim liante a bawl, i paina lampi khempeuh leh i nawk mite khempeuh lakah hong kempa pen Topa i Pasian ahi hi
Topa in eite' mai-ah tua gama teng Amor mite khempeuh hawlkhia hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah pen eite' Pasian ahih manin kote in zong Topa' na ka sem ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Ahih hangin Joshua in mite kiangah, “ Topa' na na semzo kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen a siangtho Pasian hi a, a aam Pasian zong ahi hi. Note' thupalsatna ahi a, na khialhna uh ahi zongin hong maisaklo ding hi
Topa nusia-in gamdang pasian-te' na na sep uh leh, note tungah a hoih hong bawl khit ciangin amah hong kihei-in note' tungah siatna hong bawlin note hong beisak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin mite in Joshua kiangah, “Hilo hi; Topa' na ka sem ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in mite kiangah, “Ama na a sem dingin Topa na teel khitna uhah note-a' dingin note mah teci na hi uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in, “Kote, teci ka hi uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Amah in, “Tua ahih leh note' lakah a om gamdang pasian-te koihkhia un la, Israel Pasian, Topa' lamah na lungsim uh nga un,” a ci hi
Mite in Joshua kiangah, “ Topa i Pasian' na ka sem ding uh a, ama thu ka mang ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in Shekhem-ah tua ni-in mite tawh thuciamna bawl a, amaute-a' dingin thukham leh biakna ngeina kipte a bawl hi
Tua ciangin Joshua in Pasian' thukham laibu sungah hih kammalte a gelh hi. Amah in suangtum lianpi khat la-in Topa biakna mun tawsaw nuai-ah a phut hi

Tua ciangin Joshua in mi khempeuh kiangah, “En un, hih suangtum pen eite' langkhatah teci hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in eite tungah hong thugen khempeuh hih suangtum in za khin hi. Tua ahih ciangin note, na Pasian uh tungah a manloin na gamtatlohna dingun hih suangtum pen note' langkhatah teci hi ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in a milipin amau' gamh ciatah, mite a ciahsak hi.
Hih thute khit ciangin Topa' nasem, Nun' tapa Joshua si a, a khan' kum za leh kum sawm khat a pha hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Gaash mual leilu lam, Efraim mualtung gama om Timnathserah muna ama gamhluah leitangah a vui uh hi
Joshua' khang sung leh Joshua sangin sau a nungtazaw upate khempeuh khang sungin Israel mite in Topa' na sem a, Israel mite-a' dingin Topa in a sep na khempeuh a thei uh hi

Israel mite in Egypt panin a puak uh Josef' guhte pen Shekhem' pa Hamor' tapate tung panin Jakob in dangka za khat tawh a lei Shekhem leitangah kivui a, tua leitang pen Josef' suanlekhakte' luah a suak hi
Tua ciangin Aaron' tapa Eleazar a si hi. Amaute in Efraim mualtung gamsunga a om, ama tapa Finehas tungah a kipia Gibeah khua-ah a vui uh hi.
